criteria.name: Use-Cases & Anforderungen
criteria.note: 5 Kernfunktionen as UC table (Actor+Trigger+Outcome+Realises FR) + stakeholder table; anchor tables widerspruchsfrei. Watch: rendered use-case diagram contradicts catalogue on UC-05 (scored under crit 5).

criteria.name: NfA nach SMART
criteria.note: 6 NfA each with Zielwert + Messverfahren + Measured + governing ADR (e.g. NfA-4 p95<200ms, measured 15.8ms, ADR-002/006).

criteria.name: Vision
criteria.note: Clear Problemstellung; vision with Zielgruppe/Beduerfnis/Abgrenzung; one KI-Nutzen sentence per Kernfunktion (incl. UC-04 'deliberately zero AI').

criteria.name: Architektur Bild+Text
criteria.note: C4 L1+L2 consistent with text; style per ADR-002; 17 ADRs; roter Faden index->intro->strategy->decisions->fazit holds durchgaengig.

criteria.name: Perspektiven
criteria.note: All three perspectives present with diagram+text, so NOT the 4-pt two-perspective tier. Docked 1: use-cases.puml marks UC-05 <<designed>>/not-implemented while arc42/01 marks UC-05 'live (this release)' — a real diagram/text contradiction a strict conjunctive read punishes.

criteria.name: Datenmodell
criteria.note: ER diagram + two-table model explained + db/migrations + pgvector(1024) HNSW/cosine documented.

criteria.name: Code-Struktur
criteria.note: Clean ingestion/serving/mcp split + console app module; component table maps each module to a responsibility consistent with the freeze-line entwurf.

criteria.name: Framework-Konzepte
criteria.note: arc42/08 quotes crit 8 verbatim; DI (Depends), env-only config, Pydantic validation, uniform boundary error handling; framework choice justified (ADR-001); console tests wired into CI.

criteria.name: Erkenntnisse
criteria.note: LEARNINGS.md >=8 entries with commit/PR refs and explicit accept/correct/reject dispositions on AI suggestions (e.g. drift-guard accepted PR #12 257c0e0).

criteria.name: Git-Repository
criteria.note: Clickable repo URL in report, source complete. CONDITIONAL on the owner-only Block-3 public flip; drops to 0/2 if the repo is private at submission. Codex could not verify anonymous access either.

criteria.name: Abnahmekriterien
criteria.note: One Given/When/Then per Kernfunktion against a concrete observable; explicit 'Verifies (NfA)' column cross-references NfA-1..NfA-6.

criteria.name: Teststrategie
criteria.note: Teststufen named+justified; dedicated 'Tests of the AI components' with four named real families (guardrail, gap-gate, fill-reuse non-determinism, fail-closed) and named test files.

criteria.name: Unit-Tests
criteria.note: Large offline suite incl. named error cases (validator/mapper fail-closed, double-freeze ValueError); runs green in the CI build.

criteria.name: Test-Ergebnisse
criteria.note: Pipeline output and coverage TOTALs quoted verbatim AND interpreted ('residual misses are bounded and named'); screenshots explicitly demoted to illustration. The 3-pt anchor, not the 1-pt screenshot anchor.

criteria.name: KI-Werkzeuge
criteria.note: Phase-structured (Generierung/Review/Refactoring/Recherche) with prompts/diffs/PR+commit refs. CONJUNCTIVE MISS: Eigenstaendigkeitserklaerung is an unsigned placeholder in BOTH docs/method/ai-tools.md and tools/build_pdf.py (ERKLAERUNG). 'vollstaendig' fails, capping at 7-pt tier; a strict grader could go lower. Owner-gated by Fazit veto 3.

criteria.name: KI-Services
criteria.note: Two substantial KI roles (fill-only ai_map with structured output + e5/MCP embedding search); guardrails (gap-gate, schema-constrained, AST boundary, label law); human-in-the-loop review form.

criteria.name: Container-Sub-Systeme
criteria.note: compose + per-sub-system Dockerfiles + Helm/k3d; module borders consistent with entwurf; style choice justified via ADR-002/006; runtime evidence captured in docs/img and Sec 7.

criteria.name: Fazit
criteria.note: Three concrete, justified, evidenced vetoes (freeze line PR #2; plan+merge gate, 501-vs-404 PR #4; final acceptance PR #17) + honest limits + substantive transfer ('match the working mode to the blast radius of an error').

gaps_ranked.action: Replace the Eigenstaendigkeitserklaerung placeholder in BOTH docs/method/ai-tools.md and the ERKLAERUNG block in tools/build_pdf.py with the owner's own final FFHS declaration text and signature, then rebuild and inspect the PDF. Owner-gated by Fazit veto 3; unlocks crit 15 from 7 to 12.
Flip the repository to public and confirm github.com/erhanuenlue/tarifhub resolves anonymously (no login) before hand-in; otherwise crit 10 silently collapses from 2 to 0 at grading.

Fix the UC-05 status contradiction in use-cases.puml (stereotype + legend) to match the 'live (this release)' catalogue status and re-render the SVG; also strip em-dashes from diagram sources (use-cases.puml, seq-review-freeze.puml, runtime-harmonise-freeze.svg) before the single-PDF compile.

top_actions: Sign the Eigenstaendigkeitserklaerung in both docs/method/ai-tools.md and tools/build_pdf.py with the owner's own self-authored FFHS declaration text and signature, then rebuild and inspect the PDF (+5, crit 15; the one element AI must not author).
Flip the repo to public and verify anonymous access to github.com/erhanuenlue/tarifhub before submission (+2 protected, crit 10).

Fix the UC-05 diagram/text contradiction in use-cases.puml, re-render the SVG, and strip residual em-dashes from the diagram sources before the single-PDF compile so the roter Faden and quoted evidence survive the markdown-to-PDF transform (+1, crit 5; report quality).
